# `notifications` - database schema slice

Source of truth: [`backend/prisma/schema.prisma`](../../../prisma/schema.prisma).
This file mirrors the Prisma models owned by this feature so the schema is
co-located with the code that reads/writes it. Regenerate via:

```bash
pwsh backend/scripts/scaffold-feature-schemas.ps1
```

## `Notification`

```prisma
model Notification {
  id               String    @id @default(uuid())
  userId           String
  sourceUserId     String? // User who triggered the notification (for group messages, friend requests, etc.)
  title            String
  message          String
  type             String    @default("info") // friend_request, group_expense, loan_reminder, etc.
  category         String?
  deepLink         String?
  priority         String    @default("normal") // high, normal, low
  channels         Json      @default("[\"app\"]") // JSON array: ["app", "email", "push"]
  metadata         Json?
  // Multi-channel Delivery Tracking
  deliveryStatus   Json      @default("{}") // JSON: {app: sent, email: queued, push: failed}
  encryptedPayload String? // Optional encrypted payload (if E2E encryption enabled)
  isRead           Boolean   @default(false)
  createdAt        DateTime  @default(now())
  readAt           DateTime?
  deletedAt        DateTime? // Soft-delete for compliance
  user             User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([createdAt])
  @@index([isRead])
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([sourceUserId])
  @@index([type])
  @@index([deletedAt])
  @@index([userId, isRead, createdAt]) // unread notification counts + sorted feed
  @@schema("public")
}
```
